data.content:
This is an **NUnit** project running on **VSTest**. Use the `--filter` flag with `ClassName`:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~ReportExporterTests"
```

Or more precisely:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "ClassName=Contoso.Reports.Tests.ReportExporterTests"
```

Both work — the first matches any test whose fully qualified name contains `ReportExporterTests`, the second matches the exact class.
